holdings.infoBox: EIS is an equity ETF with a total of 131 individual holdings. The top holdings are Teva Pharmaceutical Industries stock at 9.16%, Bank Leumi le-Israel B.M. at 7.92%, Tower Semiconductor at 7.39%, Bank Hapoalim B.M. at 6.85%, and Elbit Systems at 5.35%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Israel ETF (EIS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Israel Capped index, a market-cap-weighted index of Israeli firms. EIS was launched on Mar 26, 2008 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Israel's stock market, which rose at the outset of war with Iran, has lost those gains
data.text: The Israeli stock market, which initially rallied at the onset on the country's joint campaign with the U.S. against Iran, is now trading at pre-war levels.

data.title: Israeli shekel recovers losses as war continues
data.text: Israel's shekel has recovered its losses following the Hamas attack of October 7 amid signs investors are moving back into the country's markets despite a continuing war.

data.text: Geopolitical tensions in the Middle East are weighing on investor sentiment in the exchange-traded fund market as traders watch for ripple effects from the Israel-Hamas war.
